creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Q/A:
FATAL: Makefile: [15]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name
FATAL: Makefile: [19]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name
WARN: Makefile: [20]: use tab (not space) to make indentation
FATAL: Makefile: [24]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name

Would you have a look at those?

Thanks!
